label: Alert Summary
description: Active alert count, critical count, average resolution time, and 24-hour total alert count.

0.1.note: WidgetErrorBoundary wraps all widgets via widget-wrapper.tsx line 89

0.5.note: No lib/mocks imports in widget file

0.6.note: isLoading from useAlertsData() used: metric values show '—' while loading

0.7.note: Empty/zero state handled: KpiSummaryWidget renders 0 counts correctly; '0 Active Alerts' is a valid non-error state for this widget class

0.8.note: Global WidgetErrorBoundary covers runtime errors per spec 0.8

0.9.note: No dead code. AVG_RESOLUTION_DISPLAY and LAST_24H_DISPLAY are placeholder constants pending API — documented in file comment, not dead code

1.1.note: Data sourced exclusively from useAlertsData() context hook (activeCount, criticalCount, isLoading)

1.2.note: AlertsDataProvider reads useGlobalScope() and filters by scopeStrategyIds

1.3.note: allAlerts memoized on scope.organizationIds; org filter change recalculates activeCount and criticalCount

1.4.note: scope.clientIds cascades through getStrategyIdsForScope in context

1.5.note: scope.strategyIds cascades through getStrategyIdsForScope in context

1.6.note: scopeStrategyIds.length === 0 returns all alerts; widget shows full counts when no filter active

1.7.note: AVG_RESOLUTION_DISPLAY and LAST_24H_DISPLAY are module-level constants (correct placement for placeholder values awaiting API)

l1.notes: Pure display widget — reads 3 computed values from context. No direct filtering required in widget itself.

l2.notes: Covered globally by commits 32ba8ab (structured {domain, tier} entitlements across all 17 register.ts files + 5 PageEntitlementGate wrappers) and f9f29ea (65 automated tests in __tests__/integration/entitlement-wiring.test.ts, __tests__/components/platform/*entitlement-gate.test.tsx, __tests__/lib/config/trading-entitlements.test.ts). Re-audit per-widget only if the wiring test fails or entitlements are added.

3.1.note: Mode relevance: live ✓ (shows real-time counts), paper ✓ (same as live), batch ✓ (shows historical counts). Pure read-only display — no mode-specific UI changes needed.

3.2.note: AlertsDataProvider reads scope.mode; useAlerts hook sets refetchInterval: false in batch mode (use-alerts.ts:20). activeCount/criticalCount derived from same memoized allAlerts.

3.5.note: Paper mode: counts reflect paper-mode alert data from API. No special handling needed — this is a pure display widget.

3.6.note: No WebSocket or timer in this widget. useAlerts refetchInterval disabled in batch (use-alerts.ts:20).

l3.notes: Agent checks 3.1/3.2/3.5/3.6 complete. Human checks 3.3/3.4 pending — N/A for this widget (no order entry buttons, no batch-mode visual indicator needed for a read-only KPI strip).

4.1.note: No buttons in this widget. Pure display — no onClick handlers.

4.6.note: No entitlement checks running in the widget component itself. All handled at registry/wrapper level.

l4.notes: Agent prep complete. Human checks 4.3/4.4/4.7/4.8 pending. 4.3: only 4 KPI tiles, no form fields. 4.4/4.7/4.8 require browser walkthrough.

5.1.note: Target strategies: cross-domain (all strategies). This widget shows aggregate alert counts across all strategy types. Not specific to any single strategy archetype. Serves: basis-trade, recursive-staked-basis, amm-lp, lending-borrowing, staking, cross-chain-bridge, and all CeFi/TradFi strategies.

l5.notes: 5.1 complete. Human checks 5.2-5.6 pending — this is a read-only aggregate widget, not strategy-execution-specific. 5.2-5.5 largely N/A (no params to set, no submit action). 5.6: venue-agnostic.

l6.notes: Deferred — L6 (tests) not in scope for this agent pass.

7.1.note: No hardcoded hex/rgb/hsl colors. No var(--status-error) usage in this file.

7.2.note: No lib/mocks imports. No duplicated fixtures.

7.3.note: 38 lines — well within 500-line limit. Single function component.

7.4.note: AlertsKpiStripWidget: PascalCase ✓. useAlertsData: useCamelCase ✓. File: alerts-kpi-strip-widget.tsx kebab-case ✓.

7.5.note: Out of scope — English-only UI per product decision 2026-04-21; 7.5 reassigned to UTC datetime rendering

7.6.note: No dangerouslySetInnerHTML, eval, new Function, or innerHTML= found.

7.7.note: No useEffect/useMemo/useCallback in this widget. metrics array defined in render body but is simple value-derived array — no expensive computation.

8.1.note: No text-[...] or fontSize arbitrary values found in this widget.

8.2.note: No spacing arbitrary values (p-[...], m-[...], gap-[...]) found.

8.3.note: Uses KpiSummaryWidget (shared primitive). No raw div replacements for Card/Button/Input.

8.4.note: Agent: No , no unlabeled inputs, no interactive divs without role. KpiSummaryWidget handles its own a11y. Human walkthrough pending.

8.5.note: Human pending: resize test at minW=4, minH=1.

l8.notes: 8.1-8.4 agent checks complete. 8.5 requires human browser resize test.

keepSeparate.rationale: Singleton KPI strip — fixed at top of alerts tab layout. Serves a distinct role from alerts-table (which is the master list) and alerts-kill-switch (which is the action panel).

relationships.notes: Peer widget — reads the same allAlerts dataset as alerts-table but renders a summary strip. No cross-widget selection coupling.

dataContract.notes: useAlerts() polls /api/alerts/list via REST. refetchInterval is undefined in live mode (React Query default ~0 — no auto-refetch unless staleTime configured). In batch mode: refetchInterval: false. activeCount/criticalCount computed client-side from API response.

gaps: AVG_RESOLUTION_DISPLAY hardcoded to '12m' — not sourced from API
LAST_24H_DISPLAY hardcoded to '23' — not sourced from API
coverage.notes: Cross-domain aggregate widget. Coverage is all strategies/venues by design. Gaps are known API shape gaps, not widget code gaps.

knownIssues.description: AVG_RESOLUTION_DISPLAY ('12m') and LAST_24H_DISPLAY ('23') are hardcoded placeholder constants. Real values pending alerts API response shape extension.

findings.fix: Retired 7.5 i18n check: English-only UI per product decision 2026-04-21
